description: Update interface consumers to provide game_id when persisting entities. The game_id field was added as optional to core entity interfaces in FN-012. Follow-up work needed to: (1) Make game_id required in entity interfaces once all consumers are updated, (2) Update galaxy generators to accept gameId parameter, (3) Update test fixtures and factories to provide game_id, (4) Update API handlers to populate game_id when creating entities.

steps.name: Update galaxy generators to accept gameId parameter
Update test fixtures and factories to provide game_id
Update API handlers to populate game_id when creating entities
Make game_id required in entity interfaces

log.outcome: The specification is well-structured with a clear mission, concrete verifiable steps, accurate file scope, correct dependency on FN-012, and robust testing requirements. It includes necessary safety checks (preflight to confirm all consumers are updated before making `game_id` required) and appropriate documentation/update sections.

log.action: Rebased new worktree branch fusion/fn-018 onto origin/main

Preflight complete. FN-012 confirmed done (game_id exists as optional in game-entities.ts). Actual codebase has galaxy generators split into star-generator.ts, planet-generator.ts, lane-generator.ts with camelCase types in galaxy/types.ts. No entity-handlers.ts, entity-fixtures.ts, or entity-factories.ts exist. DB schema.ts COLUMNS don't include game_id yet (FN-010 responsibility).
plan review requested for Step 2 (Update galaxy generators to accept gameId parameter)

log.outcome: The step outlines updating galaxy generator functions to accept a `gameId` parameter and pass it to entity creation calls, but has critical sequencing issues with test updates that will cause regressions. It also lacks explicit coverage of all generator functions and assumes unverified test scripts exist.
